title: Getting Started with React Hooks
excerpt: Learn how to use React Hooks to manage state and side effects in functional components. We'll cover useState, useEffect, useContext, and build a custom hook from scratch.

title: Tailwind CSS: The Utility-First Approach
excerpt: Discover why Tailwind CSS has become so popular and how to leverage utility-first CSS for faster development, smaller bundle sizes, and a more consistent design system.

title: Building Scalable Node.js Applications
excerpt: Best practices for building scalable and maintainable Node.js applications. Topics include layered architecture, error handling, dependency injection, and performance optimization with clustering.

title: TypeScript for React Developers
excerpt: A practical guide to adopting TypeScript in your React projects. Learn how to type props, state, hooks, context, and common patterns that make refactoring safer and IDEs smarter.

title: Optimizing Web Performance in 2024
excerpt: A deep dive into Core Web Vitals, lazy loading, code splitting, and modern image optimization techniques that can dramatically improve your site's LCP, FID, and CLS scores.
